title: BEM-845 dump runner layout
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:06 (UTC+3)'
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines=runner.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines() if runner.exists() else []
hits=[]
patterns=['jobs:','steps:','Queue processor execution marker','Commit queue processor marker results','Process workflow dispatch queue','Complete job','Run executor','Commit changes','git add','uses: actions/checkout']
for i,line in enumerate(lines,start=1):
    if any(p in line for p in patterns):
        hits.append({'line':i,'text':line})
contexts=[]
for h in hits:
    if 'Queue processor execution marker' in h['text'] or 'Commit queue processor marker results' in h['text'] or 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in h['text']:
        start=max(1,h['line']-8); end=min(len(lines),h['line']+18)
        contexts.append({'around':h,'context':['%s: %s'%(n,lines[n-1]) for n in range(start,end+1)]})
marker_exists=Path('governance/state/queue_processor_step_seen.json').exists()
result_exists=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_processor_step_seen.status.json').exists()
status='layout_dumped_marker_missing' if not marker_exists and not result_exists else 'layout_dumped_marker_present'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'runner_exists':runner.exists(),'line_count':len(lines),'hits':hits[-100:],'contexts':contexts,'marker_exists':marker_exists,'result_exists':result_exists,'next_action':'rewrite codex-runner with marker/queue processor placed before main commit if current layout shows unreachable insertion','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_dump_codex_runner_queue_layout.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_dump_codex_runner_queue_layout.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Dump Codex Runner Queue Layout | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: rewrite codex-runner queue marker/processor placement based on dumped layout. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: rewrite queue processor placement based on layout.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem845_dump_codex_runner_queue_layout.json','governance/reports/bem845_dump_codex_runner_queue_layout.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Dumped codex-runner queue/marker step layout to identify why marker steps are not executing or not persisted')
"""
